use_cases: Display user profile pictures in navigation bars or headers
Show team member avatars in organizational charts or member lists
Render user avatars with online/offline status indicators in chat or collaboration tools
Display commenter or author avatars in comment sections and feeds
Show user avatars with status badges in contact lists or member directories
ai_summary: A shadcn/ui-style avatar component system built on Radix UI primitives. Includes Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback, AvatarIndicator, and AvatarStatus sub-components with variants for online/offline/busy/away status indicators. Designed for user profile displays in any application requiring identity presentation.
